privileged_info_summary: All verifiable metadata claims are correct. The task uses official Aerobridge fixture data from the GitHub repository (https://github.com/openskies-sh/aerobridge, archived Dec 2023). The existing Operator 'Electric Inspection' has Operator ID 566d63bb-cb1c-42dc-9a51-baef0d0a8d04 (associated with company ID 72b46dfb-de46-4f2c-a41a-861e5d26da52, operator type 0, with authorization SORA V2 and activity photographing). The existing TypeCertificate (the only one in the system) has ID 75f358c6-e8d3-46aa-a3de-172bdcea469d (Certificate Holder: Agro Products Inc., Issuing Country: IRE). The manufacturer 'Aerobridge Drone Company' exists in the system with company ID cce77596-873a-4c6a-97d4-2bce94c25d3e and role code 4 (manufacturer). Admin credentials are username 'admin' with password 'adminpass123'. The task requires creating a new Aircraft Model named 'Nile Scout 200', an Assembly for it, and registering Aircraft 'NS-001' with these fixtures.
